heading: Relinquishment of legislative jurisdiction over certain lands
label: 1529 Relinquishment of legislative jurisdiction over certain lands

children.text: by filing with the Governor (or, if none exists, with the chief executive officer) of the State, Commonwealth, territory, or possession concerned a notice of relinquishment to take effect upon acceptance of the notice; or
as required by the laws of the State, Commonwealth, territory, or possession.
